steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a newspaper-style article layout page for 'The Daily Chronicle' with all the specified requirements.

First, I'll write the HTML file with inline CSS to implement the newspaper layout.

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>The Daily Chronicle</title>
    <style>

steps.assistant_content_head: Now I'll render the newspaper page using a headless browser to verify it meets the specifications. I'll use Playwright to render the page at 1920x1080 viewport and save it as a PNG for verification.

tool_calls.name: bash
